sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56295" key="kaxh/meros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰχ-ήμερος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n56295.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">passing an unhappy day,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.508</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>); <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κακ</itype>-.</sense> </entryFree>
